faqs.question: Where is Parkside Medical Center located?
faqs.answer:
📍 *Parkside Medical Center*
123 Parkside Road, [Your City], [State] - XXXXXX

🗺️ Google Maps: https://maps.google.com/?q=Parkside+Medical+Center

🅿️ Free parking is available for patients.

faqs.question: What are the clinic working hours?
faqs.answer:
🕐 *Parkside Medical Center Timings:*

📅 Monday – Saturday: 9:00 AM – 8:00 PM
📅 Sunday: 10:00 AM – 1:00 PM (Emergency Only)

For OPD timings of specific doctors, please select *Doctor Timings* from the menu.

faqs.question: Is emergency service available?
faqs.answer:
🚨 *Emergency Contact*

For medical emergencies, please call:
📞 *+91-XXXXXXXXXX* (Emergency Line)

Our emergency team is available 24/7. Please call immediately – do not wait for a chatbot response.

faqs.question: Which insurance is accepted?
faqs.answer:
🏥 *Insurance Accepted at Parkside Medical Center:*

Star Health, New India Assurance, United India, ICICI Lombard, Bajaj Allianz, HDFC Ergo, Reliance General, Max Bupa

✅ *Cashless facility available* for most major insurers.

For specific queries, please contact reception.

faqs.question: What are the pharmacy timings?
faqs.answer:
💊 *Pharmacy Timings:*

📅 Monday – Saturday: 8:00 AM – 9:00 PM
📅 Sunday: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM

We stock branded and generic medicines. Prescription-based dispensing.

faqs.question: What are the lab timings?
faqs.answer:
🧪 *Lab / Pathology Timings:*

📅 Monday – Saturday: 7:30 AM – 6:00 PM
📅 Sunday: 7:30 AM – 11:00 AM

⏰ *Early morning fasting samples recommended between 7:30 AM – 9:00 AM.*

faqs.question: Do you have day care or admission facilities?
faqs.answer:
🏥 *Day Care & Admission:*

✅ Day care procedures available (minor surgeries, IV infusions, endoscopy under sedation etc.)
✅ Short-term admission available

For admission-related queries, please contact our reception directly or select *Talk to Reception* from the menu.

faqs.question: Is parking available?
faqs.answer:
🅿️ *Free parking is available* for all patients and attendants.

Capacity: 30 vehicles (cars & two-wheelers)
Location: Ground level, clinic premises.
